actions.text: Amendment SA 4956 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4956, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 51. Record Vote Number: 94.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(2) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 4956.
Amendment SA 4956 proposed by Senator Hickenlooper.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4956 proposed by Senator Hickenlooper.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4956, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 51. Record Vote Number: 94.

purpose: To establish a deficit-neutral reserve fund relating to ensuring that consumers are protected from price increases associated with tariffs and the Iran war.
